positive: A stunning, high-contrast illustration of a stylized mythical creature, perhaps a griffin or phoenix, in powerful flight. The creature should be composed of dynamic geometric shapes and fluid organic elements, suggesting fire and electricity. Use a color palette limited to deep sapphire blues, brilliant gold accents, and stark obsidian blacks. The composition must be a clean, central silhouette against a gradient background of subtle smoke and cosmic dust. Art Deco influences mixed with modern vector graphics, giving it a sophisticated yet energetic feel. Perfect for repeating pattern prints or central apparel designs. Minimalist, high-contrast, vector illustration, highly detailed, symmetrical arrangement.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, lowres, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, multiple figures, extra limbs, noise, grain, sketch, realistic photo
